title: Beehiiv vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and Constant Contact. See pricing, features, and find the best email marketing tool for your needs.
h1: Beehiiv vs Constant Contact: Detailed Comparison
intro: Beehiiv and Constant Contact are two established email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Beehiiv focuses on newsletter creators and media operators with monetization features, while Constant Contact targets nonprofits and local businesses with broader marketing tools. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your email marketing goals.

comparison_table.tool_a: Freemium (free up to 2,500 subscribers, paid from $39/month)
comparison_table.tool_b: Paid only (starting at $12/month, no free tier)

comparison_table.tool_a: Newsletter monetization, ad network, referral program, web reader
comparison_table.tool_b: Event management, SMS, social media ads, e-commerce integration

choose_a_if: You're a newsletter creator or media operator looking to monetize your audience
You want to start for free with up to 2,500 subscribers before paying
You value modern, specialized features like referral programs and web readers
choose_b_if: You need event management, SMS marketing, or advanced e-commerce features
You're a nonprofit or local business requiring broad marketing capabilities
You prefer an established platform with decades of experience in email marketing

faq.q: Is Beehiiv better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Beehiiv excels for newsletter publishers with monetization needs and has higher user satisfaction ratings. Constant Contact offers broader marketing features like SMS, event management, and e-commerce tools that make it better for small businesses. Choose based on whether you prioritize newsletter growth (Beehiiv) or multi-channel marketing (Constant Contact).

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Constant Contact?
faq.a: Beehiiv is cheaper initially because it offers a free tier for up to 2,500 subscribers with no payment required. Constant Contact has no free tier and starts at $12/month. However, once you exceed Beehiiv's free limits, pricing becomes competitive, and the best value depends on your subscriber count and feature needs.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms typically support email list imports, making migration straightforward. You can export your subscriber list from Constant Contact and import it into Beehiiv. Before switching, ensure Beehiiv has all the features you need, particularly if you rely on Constant Contact's SMS or e-commerce tools.
